hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then EXT="${FILE##*.}"; DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BIOME=''; while [ "$DIR" != '/' ]; do if [ -f "$DIR/biome.json" ] || [ -f "$DIR/biome.jsonc" ]; then BIOME="$DIR"; break; fi; DIR=$(dirname "$DIR"); done; if [ -n "$BIOME" ]; then pnpm exec biome format --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; else case "$EXT" in js|jsx|ts|tsx|json|css|md) npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; py) black --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; fi; fi; exit 0

COMMAND=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf\s+/'; then echo 'Blocked: rm -rf / is never allowed.' >&2; exit 2; elif echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE 'git\s+push\s+.*-(-force|f)\b|git\s+push\s+--force-with-lease|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+checkout\s+\.|git\s+restore\s+\.|git\s+branch\s+-D|git\s+clean\s+-f'; then echo '⚠️  Destructive git operation detected: this command may discard work or affect shared state. If this operation is required, re-run it and approve when prompted.' >&2; exit 2; elif echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE '\bnpm\s+(install|run|exec|start|test|build|ci|init)\b|\bnpx\s+'; then echo '⚠️  npm/npx detected. This project uses pnpm exclusively. Use pnpm/pnpm exec/pnpm dlx instead. If npm/npx is truly required here, re-run and approve.' >&2; exit 2; else exit 0; fi

hooks.prompt: Classify the conversation: (A) Implementation task — code was written or edited to fulfill specific acceptance criteria (look for Write/Edit tool calls that changed source code, not just config or docs). (B) Everything else — discussion, planning, Q&A, audit, review, config changes, documentation edits, workflow fixes, CLAUDE.md/settings.json edits. If B: respond {"decision": "allow"}. If A: check — all AC met? Tests run? Anti-Goodhart passed (tests validate behavior, not just output)? If incomplete, respond {"decision": "block", "reason": "Incomplete: [what's missing]"}. If all done, respond {"decision": "allow"}.

hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs attention" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Claude needs attention' 2>/dev/null; exit 0
